user.title: Zyxel NWA Access Point
user.description: Connect to your Zyxel NWA access point in standalone mode. Make sure it is NOT managed via Nebula cloud.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the access point. Check the IP address and make sure the AP is in standalone mode (not Nebula managed).
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This access point is already configured.
